name: 색에 무관한 콘텐츠 인식
issue: Navbar.tsx:38-39 — Active nav link is distinguished only by color change (text-blue-600 vs text-zinc-600). No additional indicator (underline, icon, font-weight) is provided. Requires runtime visual verification.
fix_guide: Add a non-color indicator for the active link, e.g., font-weight-bold, underline, or an aria-current="page" attribute: <Link aria-current={pathname === link.href ? 'page' : undefined} className="... underline ...">

name: 자동 재생 금지
issue: No autoplay attributes or automatic .play() calls found in any of the three files.
fix_guide: N/A

name: 텍스트 콘텐츠의 명도 대비
issue: page.tsx:47 — text-xs text-zinc-400 on white/dark backgrounds. Tailwind zinc-400 (#a1a1aa) on white (#ffffff) yields approximately 2.7:1 contrast ratio, below the 4.5:1 requirement for small text. Similarly, text-zinc-500 (#71717a) on white yields ~4.6:1 which is borderline. Exact contrast depends on the resolved background color at runtime.
fix_guide: Use darker text colors for small text. Replace text-zinc-400 with text-zinc-500 or darker to ensure 4.5:1 minimum contrast ratio. Verify with a contrast checker tool at runtime.

name: 콘텐츠 간의 구분
issue: Requires runtime visual verification. StatsCard uses border for visual separation (border-zinc-200). page.tsx:73 — dynamically inserted recentItems divs use 'border p-2 mt-2' which provides some separation. Manual check recommended.
fix_guide: Ensure adjacent content blocks have at least one visual distinction (border, spacing, color). Current implementation appears adequate but needs visual confirmation.

name: 키보드 사용 보장
issue: StatsCard.tsx:17 — <div onClick={handleClick}> is a non-interactive element with a click handler but no keyboard accessibility. Missing tabIndex, role="button", and onKeyDown handler. Keyboard users cannot activate this control.
fix_guide: Either change to a <button> element or add keyboard support: <div role="button" tabIndex={0} onClick={handleClick} onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') handleClick(); }}>

name: 초점 이동과 표시
issue: No explicit outline:none or outline:0 found. However, StatsCard.tsx div with onClick has no tabIndex so it never receives focus at all, which is related to A-10. Focus order in Navbar appears logical. No focus trap issues detected statically.
fix_guide: Ensure all interactive elements are focusable and have visible focus indicators. After fixing A-10, verify focus styling is present on the StatsCard.

name: 조작 가능
issue: page.tsx:59-64 — Icon buttons (btn-refresh, btn-settings) contain only 16x16 SVGs with no padding. These may be below the minimum 44x44px touch target size. Exact rendered size depends on padding/styling at runtime.
fix_guide: Add minimum sizing to icon buttons: <button className="p-2 min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px]"> to ensure adequate touch target size.

name: 문자 단축키
issue: No single-character keyboard shortcut handlers found in any of the three files.
fix_guide: N/A

name: 응답시간 조절

name: 반복 영역 건너뛰기

Add a skip navigation link at the very top of the layout: 본문 바로가기 and add id="main-content" to the
element wrapping the dashboard content.

fix_guide: N/A — heading structure is logical. Verify <title> is set appropriately in the layout file.

name: 레이블과 네임
issue: page.tsx:59-60 — <button data-testid="btn-refresh"> contains only an SVG icon with no aria-label, aria-labelledby, or visible text. Screen readers will announce this as an unlabeled button. Same issue at page.tsx:62-63 for btn-settings.
fix_guide: Add aria-label to icon-only buttons: <button aria-label="새로고침" data-testid="btn-refresh"> and <button aria-label="설정" data-testid="btn-settings">

name: 기본 언어 표시

fix_guide: Verify that the root layout.tsx contains <html lang="ko">. If not, add it.

name: 오류 정정
issue: page.tsx references <TodoForm onSubmit={addTodo} /> but the form's error handling implementation is in a separate file not in scope. Cannot verify error messaging, focus management on error, or aria-invalid usage from these files alone.
fix_guide: Verify that TodoForm provides: (1) descriptive error messages, (2) focus moves to the error field, (3) aria-invalid and aria-describedby are used on invalid inputs.

name: 레이블 제공
issue: No direct <input>, <textarea>, or <select> elements found in the three analyzed files. Form inputs are delegated to <TodoForm> component (not in scope). Cannot verify label provision.
fix_guide: Verify that TodoForm and other form components have proper <label> elements or aria-label attributes on all input fields.

name: 마크업 오류 방지
issue: StatsCard.tsx:13 — id="stat-card" is hardcoded. This component is rendered 3 times on page.tsx:52-54, resulting in 3 elements with duplicate id="stat-card", violating HTML uniqueness requirement. Additionally, page.tsx:73 — recentItems.map() renders <div> elements without a key prop, which is a React/JSX markup issue.
fix_guide:
Fix duplicate IDs: use dynamic id based on testId prop: id={testId} or remove the id entirely. Fix missing keys: {recentItems.map((item, index) =>
{item}
)}

name: 웹 애플리케이션 접근성 준수
issue: Navbar.tsx:59-72 — Hamburger button toggles a mobile menu but lacks aria-expanded attribute to communicate menu state to assistive technology. StatsCard.tsx:10-21 — clickable div acts as a custom interactive component without any ARIA role or state.
fix_guide: Navbar hamburger: add aria-expanded={menuOpen} to the hamburger button. StatsCard: either use <button> element or add role="button" with appropriate ARIA attributes.

name: 시맨틱 랜드마크 사용
issue: page.tsx — The dashboard page content is wrapped in a plain <div> (line 42) instead of <main>. There is no <header>, <main>, or <footer> landmark in the page component. Navbar.tsx correctly uses <nav> for navigation.
fix_guide: Wrap the dashboard page content in <main>: replace the outermost <div> on line 42 with <main id="main-content">. Add <header> and <footer> landmarks as appropriate in the layout.

name: 인터랙티브 요소의 시맨틱 태그
issue: StatsCard.tsx:10-21 — A <div> with onClick handler is used as an interactive element. This should be a <button> or have role="button" with proper keyboard support.
fix_guide: Replace <div onClick={handleClick}> with <button onClick={handleClick} className="..." type="button"> or wrap content in a <button> element for native keyboard and screen reader support.

Wrap repeated items in
    and each item in
  • :
      {recentItems.map(item =>
    • {item}
      • )}
    . Similarly, wrap nav links in

      element.

issue: Navbar.tsx:131-147 — Breadcrumbs component uses a plain <div> instead of a <nav aria-label="breadcrumb"> with an <ol> list structure, which is the recommended semantic pattern for breadcrumbs.
